title: Bad Clowns Long Live The King
description: THE KING IS DEAD! And no one is more surprised than the 3 viable candidates to be his successor. His only son, Prince Christian, his right hand man, Councillor Sam, and his slop boy... Slop Boy John. However, they can only ascend the throne with the support of the local lords, ladies, and gentlefolk. YOU, the audience! Join the Bad Clowns and shape the future of the entire kingdom! For better, or for worse... LEICESTER COMEDY FESTIVAL BEST VARIETY NOMINEE LEICESTER SQUARE SKETCH-OFF FINALISTS IYAF BEST COMEDY WINNERS ★★★★★ - GettheChance ★★★★★ - WestEndBestFriend ★★★★★ - TonyLovestheFringe ★★★★★ - Number9
